title: eryngium tricuspidatum subsp. bovei
intro: Eryngium tricuspidatum subsp. bovei is a plant species also known as Bove's eryngium, a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. The medicinal properties of Eryngium tricuspidatum subsp. bovei include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Eryngium tricuspidatum subsp. bovei is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
